goal: Implement the first hardening phase from the roadmap.
deliverable: An API smoke-check script wired into validation
A small operations-center API helper seam
constraints: Do not touch the user's real app data during smoke validation
Do not introduce procurement-domain changes yet
acceptance_criteria: The default validation command runs more than syntax checks
The smoke flow covers authenticated item and ops-center APIs
Operations-center request URLs are moved behind a small helper seam
product_acceptance_criteria: The next implementation rounds can start from a safer floor
Frontend ops-center changes have a slightly clearer seam than before
manual_spot_checks: Check that smoke validation writes only to a temporary runtime directory
Check that auth setup and cookie flow work in the smoke run
Check that attachment upload and backup health checks succeed
Check that the frontend still loads the operations helper correctly
completion_language_policy: Only claim completion after the smoke validation and code changes run successfully and stay within Phase 0 scope.
delivery_truth_contract: State only the Phase 0 work actually implemented and verified in this run.
inferred_assumptions: The user wants implementation to begin with the first planned phase.
A smaller, reliable smoke path is more valuable now than a broader test matrix.
A narrow helper seam is enough to make later ops-center work safer.
